typecheck.command: cd /Users/yasyf/Code/cc-sentiment && echo "cc-sentiment has no typecheck baseline (no pyright/mypy config in project); skipping per services.yaml policy"

lint.command: cd client && uv run --with ruff ruff check cc_sentiment/tui tests/test_tui.py

blockingIssues.description: client/tests/tuistory/conftest.py starts mitmdump before entering fixture teardown protection; if startup checks fail before yield, process cleanup is skipped and mitmdump can leak.
client/tests/tuistory/driver.py can treat timeout-forced closes as success by default (fallback app_exit returncode=0 when require_app_exit is false), allowing false-positive harness passes.
client/tests/tuistory/setup/test_manual_and_pending.py over-constrains cadence with len(window) >= 3 in 25s, while the contract requires >=2 polls in that window.
client/tests/tuistory/setup/test_nav_keyboard.py asserts exactly 4 Enter presses instead of <=4, rejecting contract-compliant faster flows.
client/tests/tuistory/setup/test_nav_keyboard.py checks scripted command types, not tuistory event output, so it does not prove that synthesized click events never occurred.
client/tests/tuistory/setup/test_resilience.py infers remote-elision from sparse snapshots rather than asserting actual stage transition history; transient remote renders could be missed.
client/tests/tuistory/setup/test_invariants.py orphan check only targets setup process patterns and does not assert mitmdump/relay/temp-home child-process cleanup per feature contract.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update tui-tests-worker guidance to require deterministic handling of loading snapshots: avoid transient loading goldens unless explicitly synchronized to a stable gate.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: scenario-happy-path review failed on loading snapshot race; fix-flaky-ssh-via-gh-loading-snapshot passed by removing unstable loading assertions.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify tui-tests-worker keyboard-only verification to require event-level evidence (tuistory log/output) for no-click assertions, not only script-command inspection.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: scenario-nav-keyboard-escape review found test coverage checked scenario command list only, which cannot prove no synthesized click events.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify tui-tests-worker dry-run and harness success criteria: intercepted HTTPS evidence source, app-exit requirements, and process-lifecycle cleanup expectations.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: tuistory-mitmproxy-harness review found ambiguity around interception proof and timeout/forced-close success handling.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add dedicated command coverage for `tests/tuistory` linting and non-tuistory regression guard; remove unsupported pytest-timeout flags from shared shortcuts unless plugin availability is guaranteed.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews flagged timeout-flag mismatches and missing explicit non-tuistory regression command in shared validator shortcuts.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify orphan-process verification contract for M3 scenarios to explicitly include harness-owned mitmdump/relay/setup descendants and acceptable path matching on macOS (/private symlink variants).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: scenario-invariants-and-regression review identified mismatch between expected orphan-process scope and implemented assertions.
